title: mentha neesiana
intro: Mentha neesiana, also known as Nees' mint or Australian mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, characterized by its bright green leaves and small purple flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Mentha neesiana include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to improve respiratory health and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and as a natural flavoring agent in foods and beverages.
